ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size category (e.g., Kid's, Yth S, Yth M, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size category is intended (e.g., boys, girls, unisex) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the size category (e.g., 5-7 years) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category the measurement applies to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Chest, Singlet Length, Shorts Length) */,
  "value_cm" REAL /* Value of the measurement in centimeters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the measurement range */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the measurement range */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is a standard or custom measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_approximations" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category the age applies to */,
  "approximate_age" TEXT /* Approximate age range for the size category */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the range */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the range */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the age range is estimated or based on precise data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_approximations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update log */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who performed the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the changes made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the measurement before the update */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the measurement after the update */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update has been approved by a senior team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_updates_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., designer, marketer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* Detailed permissions in JSON format for better flexibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category sold */,
  "sold_units" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in this size */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the size was sold */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, retail, wholesale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design specification */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category the specification applies to */,
  "design_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the design */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the clothing item (e.g., stripes, polka dots) */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the design can be customized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_specifications_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category the feedback is related to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Categorization of the feedback (e.g., fit, comfort, design) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)
